Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: I took back Video.js after 16 years and we rewrote it to be 88% smaller 95 upvotes, 9 comments
  2. Jury finds Meta liable in case over child sexual exploitation on its platforms 65 upvotes, 8 comments
  3. Show HN: Gridland: make terminal apps that also run in the browser 60 upvotes, 8 comments
  4. How the world’s first electric grid was built 40 upvotes, 5 comments
  5. What Happened to Gem? 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Show HN: Email.md – Markdown to responsive, email-safe HTML 176 upvotes, 47 comments
  7. Show HN: Gemini can now natively embed video, so I built sub-second video search 217 upvotes, 63 comments
  8. Data Manipulation in Clojure Compared to R and Python 81 upvotes, 19 comments
  9. Debunking Zswap and Zram Myths 174 upvotes, 50 comments
  10. Wine 11 rewrites how Linux runs Windows games at kernel with massive speed gains 567 upvotes, 201 comments
  11. ARM AGI CPU: Specs and SKUs 87 upvotes, 24 comments
  12. I wanted to build vertical SaaS for pest control, so I took a technician job 106 upvotes, 36 comments
  13. Hypura – A storage-tier-aware LLM inference scheduler for Apple Silicon 182 upvotes, 73 comments
  14. Ripgrep is faster than grep, ag, git grep, ucg, pt, sift (2016) 318 upvotes, 137 comments
  15. No Terms. No Conditions 210 upvotes, 90 comments
  16. Hypothesis, antithesis, synthesis 176 upvotes, 77 comments
  17. GitHub is once again down 303 upvotes, 154 comments
  18. purl: a curl-esque CLI for making HTTP requests that require payment 39 upvotes, 14 comments
  19. Apple Business 464 upvotes, 300 comments
  20. Mystery jump in oil trading ahead of Trump post draws scrutiny 420 upvotes, 275 comments
  21. Nanobrew: The fastest macOS package manager compatible with brew 159 upvotes, 99 comments
  22. Show HN: ProofShot – Give AI coding agents eyes to verify the UI they build 108 upvotes, 71 comments
  23. Is anybody else bored of talking about AI? 397 upvotes, 304 comments
  24. Tell HN: Litellm 1.82.7 and 1.82.8 on PyPI are compromised 432 upvotes, 354 comments
  25. LaGuardia pilots raised safety alarms months before deadly runway crash 319 upvotes, 256 comments
  26. Arm AGI CPU 241 upvotes, 197 comments
  27. We’re saying goodbye to Sora 144 upvotes, 137 comments
  28. Missile defense is NP-complete 237 upvotes, 259 comments
  29. Epic Games to cut more than 1k jobs as Fortnite usage falls 218 upvotes, 367 comments
  30. Lago (YC S21) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 7:30am, 25 March 2026. Source here.
